nasb.text: Or else, while the other is still far away, he sends a delegation and asks for terms of peace.

esv.text: And if not, while the other is yet a great way off, he sends a delegation and asks for terms of peace.

cnv.text: 如果不能，就該趁對方還遠的時候，派使者去談判和平的條件。

ccb.text: 如果自知不敌，一定趁敌人还远的时候，就差使者去求和。

csbs.text: 否则，就会趁着他还远的时候，差派特使去求问和平的事宜。
